creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Submitter reports: 

The bug seemed to be caused because ~/.cshrc overrode $PATH when I entered gnome-terminal. 
After commenting the setenv line in ~/.cshrc, executing "echo $PATH" displayed $PATH set by /etc/login.conf. 

The bug didn't exist. My apology.
